summary: Iteration 21 - React Website Frontend Testing at /api/site/. All features tested and working correctly: Homepage with hero/cursus/stats/quote/footer, Cursus catalogue with accordion, Course detail with episodes, Login/Register pages, SPA routing, Auth flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: React website at /api/site/ fully tested. All pages working: Home (hero, cursus cards, featured courses, stats, quote, footer), Cursus list with accordion expansion showing courses, Course detail with episode list and auth-aware UI (lock vs play icon), Login and Register pages with form validation, SPA routing between pages without reload, Auth persistence in localStorage.

homepage.details: Hero section with title 'Sciences islamiques, savoir ancestral', stats (5 Cursus, 24 Cours, 100+ Episodes, 50+ Heures), 5 cursus cards with A-E letters, featured courses from Falsafa, quote section, CTA, footer

cursus_page.details: All 5 cursus visible with correct names: La Falsafa (7 cours), Théologie et Droit (2 cours), Sciences islamiques (5 cours), Arts et Littérature (6 cours), Philosophies et spiritualités (4 cours)

cursus_accordion.details: Accordion expands showing course cards. Falsafa shows 7 courses with titles, descriptions, episode counts

course_detail.details: Shows course title, description, cursus badge, scholar name, episode list. Episodes show lock icon for unauthenticated users, play icon for authenticated

login_page.details: Form with email/password inputs, 'SE CONNECTER' submit button, link to register

login_flow.details: Login redirects to home, header shows user name 'LOUBNA BIS' with avatar and 'QUITTER' logout button

register_page.details: Form with name/email/password inputs, 'S'INSCRIRE' submit button, link to login

spa_routing.details: All navigation works via react-router without full page reload. Logo returns to home, nav links work, back button on course detail works

logout_flow.details: Clears session, header returns to showing 'CONNEXION' and 'S'INSCRIRE' buttons

footer.details: Present on all pages with brand, Explorer links (Tous les cursus, Se connecter, Créer un compte), A propos links (Mentions légales, Contact, Conditions d'utilisation), copyright 2026
